description: Create a contrast sensitivity experiment in PsychoPy Builder that simulates a clinical assessment for measuring visual thresholds using an adaptive staircase procedure. The experiment must include an 'instructions' routine that displays text and ends on a spacebar press, and a 'trial' routine containing a 0.5s fixation cross, a 1.0s Grating stimulus (spatial frequency 4, size 256 pixels), and a keyboard response (left/right arrows). The Grating's contrast must update every repeat based on a staircase loop named 'staircase_loop' configured with a 1-up/3-down rule, a start value of 0.8, step sizes of [0.1, 0.05, 0.02], min/max values of 0.01 and 1.0, and 6 reversals. Save the completed experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/contrast_threshold_staircase.psyexp
